NAME: _____________________________________

FIRE PROTECTION ENGINEERING

UID: __________________ __ A.A. __ A.S. __ Post-Bac

GENERAL EDUCATION REQUIREMENTS Fundamental Studies Academic Writing (AW) Professional Writing (PW) Oral Communication (OC) Mathmatics (MA) Analytic Reasoning (AR) GenEd Distributive Studies History/Social Sciences (HS*) History/Social Sciences (HS*) Humanities (HU*) Humanities (HU*) Natural Sciences No Lab (NS) Natural Sciences w/Lab (NL) Scholarship in Practice (SP*) in major Scholarship in Practice (SP*) out major Big Question Courses Big Question (SCIS*) Big Question (SCIS*) GenEd Diversity Understanding Plural Societies (UP*) Understanding Plural Societies (UP*) OR Cultural Competency (CC*) MAJOR REQUIREMENTS Basic Sciences CHEM 135-Chem Engr or 131 & 134 -Fund & Prin PHYS 161 - General Physics I (NS) PHYS 260 and PHYS 261 - Gen Physics II & Lab (NL) MATH 140 - Calculus I (MA/AR) MATH 141 - Calculus II MATH 240 - Linear Algebra or MATH 241 - Calculus III MATH 246 - Differential Equations Engineering Sciences ENES 100 - Intro to Eng Design (SP) ENES 102 - Mechanics I ENES 220 - Mechanics II ENES 221- Dynamics ENES 232 - Thermodynamics
